## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` - New feature
- [ ] `fix` - Bug fix
- [ ] `test` - Adding/updating tests
- [ ] `docs` - Documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` - No behavior change
- [ ] `chore` - Build, deps, CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `.\scripts\pre_commit.ps1` passes green locally
- [ ] New code has dartdoc comments on all public API elements
- [ ] New tests added (unit + error paths)
- [ ] Coverage stays >= 85%
- [ ] No private key material in any test, log, or error message
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Exports added to `lib/avalanche_flutter_sdk.dart` if needed
